4.reason: [The stack is declared as char array, but it should store integers. This causes incorrect storage and retrieval of integer values.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.25 , reason:  [The stack is declared as char array, but it should store integers. This causes incorrect storage and retrieval of integer values.]

15.reason: [The condition should be top == MAX - 1 or top == 99, since the stack indices go from 0 to 99 for a size-100 stack. Comparing with 100 leads to buffer overflow.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.25 , reason:  [The condition should be top == MAX - 1 or top == 99, since the stack indices go from 0 to 99 for a size-100 stack. Comparing with 100 leads to buffer overflow.]

19.reason: [Storing an int into a char array truncates the value to 1 byte, leading to data corruption.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.25 , reason:  [Storing an int into a char array truncates the value to 1 byte, leading to data corruption.]

28.reason: [Reading a char as an int will sign-extend or zero-extend incorrectly, producing wrong output values.]
